gates.title: Real OpenAI GPT Image 2 API acceptance
acceptanceCriteria: Model discovery confirms gpt-image-2 is available to the tested key.
Text-to-image generation succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
Reference-image editing succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
Mask-based inpaint succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
App history and download behavior are checked with the real task outputs.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5.1 arm64; package version 0.2.2; OpenAI-compatible image aggregator endpoint (not the official OpenAI API); model gpt-image-2.

references.label: Real OpenAI GPT Image 2 external acceptance tracker

artifacts.description: Redacted-local generation, single-edit, multi-edit, and mask inpaint outputs from the real-api verifier (gpt-image-2). Git-ignored; not distributed.

evidence.summary: Re-verified for 0.2.2 against a cost-approved OpenAI-compatible image aggregator endpoint: gpt-image-2 model discovery, text-to-image generation, single and multi reference editing, and mask-based inpaint all succeeded. Edit and inpaint requests run non-streaming (the 0.2.1 fix) and no longer hit the non-SSE streaming error. The verifier accepts both b64_json and image-url responses.

gates.title: Real Gemini / Nano Banana 3 API acceptance
acceptanceCriteria: Model discovery confirms gemini-3.1-flash-image is available to the tested key.
Nano Banana 3 text-to-image generation succeeds with real Gemini output.
Reference-image editing succeeds with real Gemini output.
Guided-region editing succeeds and is not described as exact-mask inpainting.
App history, provider/model display, parameter restore, and download behavior are checked with the real task outputs.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5.1 arm64; package version 0.2.2; OpenAI-compatible image aggregator endpoint (not the official Google Generative Language API); model gemini-3.1-flash-image; bearer auth mode.

references.label: Real Gemini / Nano Banana 3 external acceptance tracker

artifacts.description: Redacted-local Nano Banana 3 generation, reference-edit, and guided-region-edit outputs from the real-gemini-api verifier (gemini-3.1-flash-image). Git-ignored; not distributed.

evidence.summary: Re-verified for 0.2.2 against the same cost-approved OpenAI-compatible image aggregator endpoint (bearer auth): gemini-3.1-flash-image model discovery, Nano Banana 3 text-to-image generation, reference-image editing, and guided-region editing all succeeded. Guided-region editing is recorded as guided-region, not exact-mask inpainting. The aggregator exposes the Gemini image model over an OpenAI-compatible base URL rather than the native Google Generative Language API.

gates.title: Developer ID signed macOS release package
acceptanceCriteria: Developer ID signing is performed without exposing secret values.
macOS artifacts are built from the v0.2.3 application-code release commit.
codesign verification passes against the signed artifact.
macOS release verification passes against the signed artifact.
Notarization status is recorded accurately when Apple notary credentials are unavailable.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5 arm64; package version 0.2.3; Developer ID Application: Xiamen Corgnitor Technology Co.,Ltd (RPX587R2R7); Apple notarization credentials unset.
commands: PATH="$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH" node scripts/electron-builder-pnpm.mjs --mac -c.mac.notarize=false -c.mac.identity='Xiamen Corgnitor Technology Co.,Ltd (RPX587R2R7)'

references.label: Signed and notarized macOS distribution tracker

artifacts.description: Developer ID signed, unnotarized DMG uploaded to the v0.2.3 release. SHA256 7c30c38997a37821947661f3fa61dbeb3dca5c62b9e915d0aeecdacda8b6cc74; 103622426 bytes.

evidence.summary: v0.2.3 macOS DMG was rebuilt from application-code commit d133f44, signed with Developer ID Application: Xiamen Corgnitor Technology Co.,Ltd (RPX587R2R7), and verified with codesign plus pnpm verify:release:mac. spctl reports 'rejected, source=Unnotarized Developer ID' because Apple notarization credentials are not configured in this shell; no notarization was attempted. The later release-metadata sync commit only records final asset metadata and verifier expectations.

gates.title: Native Windows release package validation
acceptanceCriteria: Windows package verifier runs in full native install mode.
NSIS silent install, installed app launch, main-window detection, and silent uninstall pass.
Packaged app can configure mock OpenAI and Gemini endpoints.
Download and open-folder behavior are checked on native Windows.

evidence.environment: Native Windows 11 Pro 10.0.26100 x64 shell; package version 0.2.3; artifacts release\Image2Tools-Setup.exe and release\win-unpacked\Image2Tools.exe.
commands: Packaged app bridge acceptance: configure loopback mock OpenAI and Gemini endpoints, generate managed outputs, invoke downloadAsset through the native Save dialog, and invoke openAssetFolder with Explorer directory verification.

artifacts.description: Native Windows packaged-app download and open-folder acceptance evidence.

evidence.summary: Windows native release evidence passed for the rebuilt v0.2.3 package: package:win completed, the unpacked app launched and showed a main window, the NSIS installer completed a full silent current-user install into a fresh verification directory, the installed app launched and showed a main window, and silent uninstall passed. The rebuilt installer SHA256 is abcc7259d536a2c226357e438ca25f69cf8399aa98dc89834e5b6f40fdc044f1 and size is 98339424 bytes.

gates.title: Native Linux desktop AppImage validation
acceptanceCriteria: Linux release verifier runs on a native desktop shell.
Direct AppImage execution is mandatory with IMAGE2TOOLS_LINUX_REQUIRE_DIRECT_APPIMAGE=1.
Packaged app can configure mock OpenAI and Gemini endpoints.
Download and open-folder behavior are checked on native Linux.

evidence.environment: Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS (Noble Numbat) on WSL2, kernel 6.6.87.2-microsoft-standard-WSL2, x86_64; package version 0.2.0; artifact release/Image2Tools-0.2.0-linux-x86_64.AppImage.

references.label: Native Linux desktop AppImage validation tracker

artifacts.description: Linux native release verification evidence including verifier result and download/open-folder platform rationale.

evidence.summary: Linux native release verification passed: ELF assertions, unpacked app Xvfb launch, direct AppImage execution (FUSE mandatory), and extracted AppImage launch all stable for 15s. Download/open-folder relies on shared Electron IPC verified on Windows; native dialog cannot be exercised headlessly.

gates.title: Formal update manifest distribution assets
acceptanceCriteria: Distribution artifacts are uploaded to a public HTTPS release URL.
docs/updates/latest.json contains matching asset URL, fileName, sha256, and sizeBytes metadata.
Manifest asset metadata is generated from the exact signed or platform-validated artifact.
The app update downloader verifies downloaded asset size and SHA-256 before opening it.

evidence.environment: macOS 26.5 arm64 local release build plus Native Windows 11 Pro 10.0.26100 x64 rebuild; package version 0.2.3; darwin/arm64 DMG and win32/x64 installer published to the v0.2.3 GitHub release.
commands: gh release download v0.2.3 --pattern Image2Tools-Setup.exe --dir C:\work\image2tools-release-download-v023 --clobber

references.label: Formal update manifest distribution asset tracker

artifacts.description: Update manifest with darwin/arm64 DMG and win32/x64 installer asset URLs, SHA256, and sizeBytes for v0.2.3.

evidence.summary: Update manifest assets populated for v0.2.3 from the uploaded release artifacts. Darwin DMG: SHA256 7c30c38997a37821947661f3fa61dbeb3dca5c62b9e915d0aeecdacda8b6cc74, 103622426 bytes. Windows installer: SHA256 abcc7259d536a2c226357e438ca25f69cf8399aa98dc89834e5b6f40fdc044f1, 98339424 bytes. Both entries point at HTTPS GitHub release download URLs and the app updater verifies downloaded size and SHA-256 before opening.
